hero.title: Pu-erh Lab
hero.subtitle: Cross-Platform RAW Editor & Digital Asset Manager
hero.description: Now supports Windows/CUDA and Apple Silicon

items.title: Windows/CUDA & macOS/Metal Dual-Platform GPU Backend
items.description: Delivers 2K 300 FPS preview and 6K 60FPS rendering on modern GPUs while maintaining low memory footprint.

items.title: HDR Workflow & Modern Color Management
items.description: Supports HDR image editing on macOS and exporting Ultra HDR format JPEG files.

items.title: ACES 2.0 & OpenDRT
items.description: Supports ACES 2.0 and OpenDRT with one-click switching of 'color science'.

items.title: LUT Support
items.description: Supports .cube LUTs for creative color grading.

items.title: Responsive Library Workflow
items.description: Thumbnail waiting animations, faster high-resolution loading, folder browsing, filters, and in-project deletion make managing large collections smoother.

items.title: Versioned Editing
items.description: Reset adjustments for each image, branchable history, aspect-ratio selection, and the export queue form a complete non-destructive iteration path.

items.title: Library Browser
items.description: Folder tree, responsive thumbnail grid, filters, and live counts keep large projects readable at a glance.

items.title: Adjustment Workspace
items.description: White balance, HSL, CDL wheels, tone shaping, and histogram-driven controls stay close to the live preview.

items.title: LUT & History
items.description: Apply LUTs, compare looks, and keep a branchable edit history close at hand while iterating on color and tone.

items.title: Custom Color Science
items.description: Build a project around custom display transforms, rendering intent, and look development instead of being locked into a single default color pipeline.

items.title: Export Queue
items.description: Batch export with format, bit-depth, resize, and metadata options for finishing multiple images in one pass.

roadmap.sectionSubtitle: Recent milestones on main after v0.1.2, plus what is still ahead

items.title: v0.1.2 Shipped
entries: OpenDRT support and rendering-transform selection UI

items.title: Metal Pipeline Integration
entries: macOS packaging logic and follow-up fixes

items.title: Forward Path
entries: Continued parity between Windows/CUDA and macOS/Metal

techStack.sectionSubtitle: A cross-platform stack built around dedicated Windows/CUDA and macOS/Metal paths

install.sectionSubtitle: Build the current Windows/CUDA or macOS/Metal tracks from source
macos: brew install cmake ninja qt opencv opencolorio duckdb exiv2 glib libraw little-cms2 highway openimageio pkg-config xxhash eigen libomp

contributing.description: Pu-erh Lab is an open-source project and contributions are welcome. Open issues, submit pull requests, or share your ideas.
